zh.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun是Richard de Mary de Bohun II的兒子，於1038年出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其。他和Ealgyph de Bayeaux至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。他於1159年在英國被列為knight 。他去世於大約1093年在英國諾福爾可塔特福德享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun是Richard de Mary de Bohun II的儿子，于1038年出生在法国巴-諾門迪曼其。他和Ealgyph de Bayeaux至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。他于1159年在英国被列为knight 。他去世于大约1093年在英国諾福爾可塔特福德享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bohan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Connor, John Patrick, Brendan, Liam.
Irish (Leitrim): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin, from a personal name which is a diminutive of buadhach ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun was born in 1038, in Manche, Lower Normandy, France as the son of Richard de Mary de Bohun II. He had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Ealgyph de Bayeaux. In 1159, his occupation is listed as knight  in England. He died about 1093, in Tatterford, Norfolk, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun est né en 1038, à Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, fils de Richard de Mary de Bohun II. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Ealgyph de Bayeaux. En 1159, sa profession de son indiquée est knight  à Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1093, à Tatterford, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun wurde 1038 in Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Richard de Mary de Bohun II geboren. Er hatte mit Ealgyph de Bayeaux mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1159 ist sein Beruf als knight  in England aufgeführt. Er starb um 1093 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Tatterford, Norfolk, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun è nato il nel 1038 nel Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia come figlio di Richard de Mary de Bohun II. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Ealgyph de Bayeaux. Nel 1159, la sua occupazione è indicata come knight  nel England. Morì circa 1093, nel Tatterford, Norfolk, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Saint-Georges-de-Bohon, Manche, Basse-No: フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-ジョージェス-デ-ボhオン
ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohunは1038年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェでRichard de Mary de Bohun IIの息子として生まれた。彼はEalgyph de Bayeauxとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。1159年，イギリスでの職業はknight と記録されている。彼は約1093年にイギリスノーフォルクタッテルフォードで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun(은)는 1038년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체에서 Richard de Mary de Bohun II의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Ealgyph de Bayeaux(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1159년, 그의 직업은 영국에서 knight 이었다. 그는 대략 1093년 영국 노르폴크 타터퍼드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Aynho, Northamptonshire, England: Aynho, North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun nasceu em 1038, em Manche, Basse-Normandie, França filho de Richard de Mary de Bohun II. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Ealgyph de Bayeaux. Em 1159, sua profissão aparece como knight  em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1093, em Tatterford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun родился в 1038 г. в местности манч, бассе-норманди, Франция. Его отца звали Richard de Mary de Bohun II. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Ealgyph de Bayeaux. В 1159 году он работал по профессии knight  в местности Англия. Он умер около 1093 г. в местности таттирфорд, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Bohun nació en 1038, en Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia como hijo de Richard de Mary de Bohun II. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Ealgyph de Bayeaux. En 1159, su ocupación registrada era knight  en Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1093, en Tatterford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
